name: Stay with you
original_name: ขอฉันมีเพียงเธอ
overview:
Ploy (Micky’s grandmother) — a mysterious woman who remains young thanks to a secret potion — must now face a scheme from rival relatives trying to take away her inheritance.

But everything changes when she meets Merview, a cold, mysterious woman who captures her heart in ways she never expected.

💥 Torn between survival and a love she can’t resist…

Will she fight for her wealth, or surrender to the one who makes her heart beat again?

trailers.title: [Official Trailer] Stay with You: Only You in My Heart | SeriesSiam
